final_prompt.prompt:
Design a logo using the provided letter "B" (serif elegante), with an eye symbol integrated in the center of the letter, referencing the style of the provided reference logo image.

风格/媒介: elegant serif logo design, flat vector
构图: letter "B" centered, eye motif placed inside/within the negative space or center of the "B"
主体: logo — letter "B" in elegant serif typeface with an eye in the middle
场景/背景: transparent or clean white background
光线/氛围:
色彩方案:
材质/纹理:
文字(原样): B
约束:
  use the exact "B" letterform from the provided reference image #1
  eye design style should follow the reference logo image #2
避免: decorative clutter, raster effects, drop shadows
